title: PokéDoge
description: Cobblemon, Farmer's Delight, Oritech, &  Etherology create a well blended pack that mixes Minecraft and Pokémon with technology, magic, exploration, and cozy building!
body:
Welcome to PokeDoge, a sprawling kitchen-sink modpack where the worlds of Pokémon and Minecraft collide!

At its heart lies Cobblemon, letting you explore the blocky wilds with your favorite companions by your side, but this is just the beginning. Build a cozy home or grand city using Decocraft, Handcrafted, and Macaw’s decorative mods. Grow fresh crops and craft delicious meals with Farmer’s Delight, or dive deep into Oritech to power your adventures with advanced machines and automation.

When it’s time to explore, take to the skies with Immersive Aircraft, glide through the clouds with Happy Ghasts, or descend into the Deep Underground, a brand-new mining dimension filled with untapped resources.

And for those who crave action, sharpen your skills (and your weapons) with Lookin’ Sharp and enhance your survivability with Everlasting Abilities.

PokeDoge is designed for every kind of player, the builder, the trainer, the tinkerer, and the adventurer. Create your own story, your own team, and your own world... all in one pack.

There's so much more to come with this pack as we continue to grow!

Wishlist for future updates:
  - Quests for the major mods
  - NPC Trainers & Badges.
